name: Cellectis Act.Nom.(Sp.ADRs)/1 E
summary: Cellectis Act.Nom.(Sp.ADRs)/1 E represents sponsored American Depositary Receipts (ADRs) of Cellectis, a French biopharmaceutical company. Cellectis is focused on developing allogeneic CAR-T cell therapies for cancer utilizing gene editing technologies. The company is headquartered in Paris, France.
